# Financial Goals

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>


A "goal" without a number and a date is a wish. This chapter is about
turning wishes into plans you can actually execute against.

  - Short / medium / long horizons
  - Sequencing goals when you can't fund them all at once
  - Tracking progress without obsessing over it
